title: Goldman’s Japan Revenue Hits 15-Year High as Foreign Banks Shine
title_cn: 外资银行大放异彩高盛日本营收创15年新高
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. generated its highest revenue from Japan in more than a decade, leading a bumper year for global banks as they sought to capitalize on the country’s financial-market rebound.

title: Sunshine Silver Files for IPO Seeking Funds to Reopen Idaho Mine
title_cn: 阳光银业申请首次公开募股 (IPO) 寻求资金以重新开放爱达荷州矿山
summary: Sunshine Silver Mining & Refining Co. filed for a US initial public offering, and is seeking funds to restart a mine in Idaho that previously produced silver, antimony and other minerals.

title: Virginia Asks US Supreme Court to Restore Voided Voting Map
title_cn: 弗吉尼亚州要求美国最高法院恢复无效的投票地图
summary: Virginia and its Democratic leaders asked the US Supreme Court to reinstate a new voter-approved congressional map that was designed to flip four Republican-held House seats in the November election.

title: Saudi Arabian Oil Exports to China Set for Deep Drop in June
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯六月份对中国的石油出口将大幅下降
summary: Saudi Arabian crude oil exports to China for loading in June are set to plunge to around 13 million to 14 million barrels, according to traders informed by the producer.

title: Oil Holds Gain as Trump Casts Doubt Over Ceasefire With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普对与伊朗的停火表示怀疑，油价保持上涨
summary: Oil steadied as US President Donald Trump cast doubt over the ceasefire with Iran after rejecting Tehran’s latest peace offer, prolonging the effective closure of the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Asia Stocks to Gain, Oil Rises on US-Iran Deadlock: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 亚洲股市上涨，油价因美伊僵局而上涨：市场结束
summary: Stocks in Asia were set to rise Tuesday, tracking Wall Street gains as investors remained bullish even as the US and Iran failed to reach terms to end their conflict.

title: China Investors Bet Xi-Trump Meet to Extend Trade-Detente Rally
title_cn: 中国投资者押注习近平与特朗普会面将延长贸易缓和反弹
summary: China investors are counting on the summit between Xi Jinping and Donald Trump to deliver just enough to sustain the detente trade underpinning stocks and the yuan.

title: Radio Station Owner Spanish Broadcasting Files Bankruptcy
title_cn: 广播电台所有者西班牙广播公司申请破产
summary: Radio station owner Spanish Broadcasting System Inc. filed for bankruptcy on Monday after announcing plans to hand ownership to noteholders in exchange for restructuring the debt.

title: Ackman’s Pershing Seeks to Toss Suit Over Howard Hughes Deal
title_cn: 阿克曼的潘兴寻求就霍华德休斯交易提起诉讼
summary: Pershing Square sought to toss what it called a “facially defective” shareholder lawsuit accusing founder Bill Ackman of bullying Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. directors into a deal that increased the investment firm’s stake at an unfairly low price.

title: SEC Moves to End ‘Gag Rule’ Criticized by Musk and Cuban
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会采取行动结束受到马斯克和库班批评的“禁言规则”
summary: The White House is reviewing a plan for the Securities and Exchange Commission to end its decades-old policy that lets companies and people settle enforcement actions without admitting wrongdoing if they also promise not to dispute the allegations.

title: Another Record Setting Day for US Equities | Closing Bell
title_cn: 美国股市再创新高|结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Central Banks in Wait-and-See Mode: Kochugovindan
title_cn: 央行处于观望模式：Kochugovindan
summary: Aberdeen Senior Research Economist Sree Kochugovindan, says inflation expectations remain anchored for now and monetary policy remains on hold for the BOE, ECB and the Federal Reserve for the rest of the year. She speaks to Bloomberg's Guy Johnson, Tom Mackenzie and Anna Edwards on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Dream Finders Homes Offers $704 Million to Buy Rival Beazer
title_cn: Dream Finders Homes 出价 7.04 亿美元收购竞争对手 Beazer
summary: Dream Finders Homes Inc. submitted a $704 million offer to acquire rival homebuilder Beazer Homes USA Inc., which rejected the bid as too low.

title: Larry Fink ‘Quite Bullish’ on Opportunity to Invest in Venezuela
title_cn: 拉里·芬克“非常看好”在委内瑞拉的投资机会
summary: BlackRock Inc. Chief Executive Officer Larry Fink expressed optimism about investing in Venezuela following the overhaul sparked by Nicolas Maduro’s removal.

title: Gold Gains as Traders Assess Latest Deadlock in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 交易商评估美伊谈判最新僵局，金价上涨
summary: Gold advanced as President Donald Trump said the US-Iran ceasefire is on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.

title: Market Still Expecting Strait of Hormuz to Reopen: Renaud-Chatelain
title_cn: 市场仍预期霍尔木兹海峡重新开放：雷诺-查特兰
summary: Pictet Wealth Management Senior Fixed Income Strategist Laureline Renaud-Chatelain says short-term inflation rates have not priced in the worse-case scenario of an extended closure of the Strait of Hormuz. She speaks to Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie, Anna Edwards and Guy Johnson on "The Opening Trade." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Currencies Drop as Iran Conflict Dims Risk Appetite
title_cn: 伊朗冲突削弱风险偏好，新兴货币下跌
summary: Emerging-market currencies weakened against the dollar on Monday as oil advanced and tensions in the Middle East escalated, with President Donald Trump and Iran’s leadership rejecting each other’s peace proposals and signaling no end in sight to the 10-week-old war.

title: UK Fintech Wise Makes US Trading Debut With Dual Listing
title_cn: 英国 Fintech Wise 通过双重上市在美国上市
summary: Wise Group Plc made its trading debut in the US with a Nasdaq listing as the financial technology firm tries to take advantage of a larger stock market and its legions of investors.

title: Hims Sales Miss on Rising Competition for Weight-Loss Drugs
title_cn: 减肥药竞争加剧，希姆斯销量下滑
summary: Hims & Hers Health Inc. reported a first-quarter loss and sales that missed Wall Street estimates amid increasing competition in the weight-loss drug market.

title: US Stocks Advance on Earnings Momentum Ahead of CPI Reading
title_cn: 美国股市在消费者物价指数 (CPI) 公布前因盈利势头而上涨
summary: US equities notched modest gains Monday as strong earnings reports spurred bullish Wall Street strategists to raise their targets on the S&P 500 this year despite lingering concerns about the duration of the Iran war ahead of a key inflation reading.

title: Goldman, BofA Delay Fed Cut Calls After ‘Last Straw’ Jobs Data
title_cn: 高盛和美国银行推迟美联储在就业数据“最后一根稻草”后降息的决定
summary: Goldman Sachs & Co and Bank of America Corp are the latest in a growing cohort of Wall Street banks pushing back their forecasts for interest-rate cuts, arguing that both jobs and inflation data make a case for the Federal Reserve to keep rates on hold until at least the end of the year.

title: Oil Climbs as US-Iran Deadlock Lifts Bond Yields: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美伊僵局提升债券收益率，油价攀升：市场总结
summary: A renewed advance in oil prices sent bonds lower after the US and Iran failed to agree on terms to end their war, dashing hopes for a revival of the Strait of Hormuz while stoking inflation concerns.

title: DRAM's First-Month Surge, Corgi Launches Record 34 ETFs | ETF IQ 5/11/2026
title_cn: DRAM首月飙升，Corgi推出创纪录的34只ETF | ETF IQ 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary: "Bloomberg ETF IQ" focuses on the opportunities, risks and current trends tied to the trillions of dollars in the global exchange traded funds industry. Today's guests: Mayuranki De, Raymond James Vice President of ETF Strategy, Cinthia Murphy, TMX Vettafi Investment Strategist, Nicolas Laqua, Corgi CEO, and Ally Wallace, Morgan Stanley Investment Management Global Head of ETFs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Climbs as Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Life Support’
title_cn: 特朗普表示美伊停火是为了“维持生命”，油价上涨
summary: Oil rose after President Donald Trump said a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran is close to unraveling, prolonging the effective closure of the crucial Strait of Hormuz.

title: Ramaphosa Shuns Calls to Resign as Lawmakers Prepare Inquiry
title_cn: 立法者准备调查时拉马福萨拒绝辞职
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa said he would contest a report that criticized his handling of a robbery at his farm in 2020 after a ruling by the nation’s top court resurrected the scandal, and rejected calls to stand down.

title: Scale, Pricing Power for Fee Compression: Wallace
title_cn: 费用压缩的规模、定价能力：华莱士
summary: Ally Wallace, Global Head of ETFs at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fervo Energy Boosts IPO Target to $1.8 Billion
title_cn: Fervo Energy 将 IPO 目标提高至 18 亿美元
summary: Fervo Energy Co., a geothermal energy developer, is seeking to raise as much as $1.82 billion in a US initial public offering, raising its target from $1.33 billion.

title: Fertilizer Maker Mosaic Cuts Output After Iran War Raises Costs
title_cn: 伊朗战争导致成本上升，化肥制造商马赛克减产
summary: Fertilizer producer Mosaic Co. is temporarily taking nearly two million tons of US phosphate production off the market, underscoring the severity of the Iran conflict’s disruptions to a key agricultural and mining input.

title: High Fees Frustrating, Investors Deserve Choices: Corgi CEO
title_cn: 高额费用令人沮丧，投资者值得选择：Corgi首席执行官
summary: Nicolas Laqua, CEO of Corgi, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." Corgi recently launched 34 new ETFs as it looks to draw attention in the industry.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Raymond James De on How Traders Use ETFs
title_cn: Raymond James De 谈交易者如何使用 ETF
summary: Mayuranki De, vice president of ETF trade strategy at Raymond James, joins Katie Greifeld, Scarlet Fu, and Eric Balchunas on "Bloomberg ETF IQ." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Low-Cost Airlines ‘Ripe’ For Mergers, Deutsche Bank Analyst Says
title_cn: 德意志银行分析师表示，低成本航空公司的合并“成熟”
summary: The US airline industry is primed for a new round of mergers as low-cost carriers are squeezed by the oil-price spike, according to Deutsche Bank analyst Michael Linenberg.

title: GitLab Says Will Cut Jobs to Spend on Growth in ‘Agentic Era’
title_cn: 亚搏体育appGitLab表示将在“代理时代”裁员以实现增长
summary: GitLab Inc., which makes software that helps developers on coding projects, said it is cutting jobs to free up money to spend on the market opportunity for artificial intelligence agents.

title: Software Firm ServiceNow Plans to Raise $4 Billion in Bond Sale
title_cn: 软件公司 ServiceNow 计划通过债券发行筹集 40 亿美元
summary: Software company ServiceNow Inc. is looking to raise about $4 billion from a potential US high-grade bond sale tied to the software firm’s recent acquisitions.

title: Verizon’s Global Hybrid Bond-Sale Push Reaches $12 Billion
title_cn: Verizon 全球混合债券发行规模达 120 亿美元
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. has raised about $12 billion from hybrid debt sales over the past six months as the US telecommunications company explores ways to support its investment-grade ratings.

title: Consumers Still Buying Beauty Products That 'Matter to Them,' Says Sally Beauty CEO
title_cn: Sally Beauty 首席执行官表示，消费者仍在购买“对他们来说很重要”的美容产品
summary: Denise Paulonis, President and CEO of Sally Beauty Holdings, said that the beauty industry remains resilient to concerns around affordability as consumer remain consistent in buying beauty products that 'matter to them' like hair dye and nail accessories even if they are not replacing pricier items. Paulonis said that she remains optimistic about her company's growth as consumers explore new e-commerce avenues like the TikTok Shop.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Seeks $4.8 Billion in Upsized IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/11/2026
title_cn: AI 芯片制造商 Cerebras 寻求 48 亿美元的大规模 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 11 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow discuss Cerebras’ increased IPO plans as the AI chipmaker and data center operator boosts its offering plans by one-third to as much as $4.8 billion. Plus, Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire explains what drove the company’s first-quarter revenue and his vision of an agent-led future. And, Google researchers say they have uncovered the first-ever zero-day attack built by AI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft Targeted $92 Billion Return on Early OpenAI Investment
title_cn: 微软的 OpenAI 早期投资目标回报为 920 亿美元
summary: Microsoft Corp. targeted a $92 billion return from its large early investments in OpenAI, a landmark arrangement that helped usher in the current AI era.

title: Meta Sued by California County Over ‘Scam’ Advertisements
title_cn: Meta 因“诈骗”广告被加州县起诉
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. was sued by Santa Clara County, California, over allegations that the company “knowingly facilitates and profits from billions of scam advertisements” on its social networks, including Facebook and Instagram.

title: Rezolve AI CEO Weighs In on Hostile Bid for Commerce.com
title_cn: Rezolve AI 首席执行官对 Commerce.com 的敌意收购发表评论
summary: Rezolve AI CEO Dan Wagner discusses the reason behind his company’s hostile bid for Commerce.com, including what he called an “embarrassing growth rate” by the takeover target. He joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Angi Becomes Latest Company to Announce AI Pivot
title_cn: Angi 成为最新一家宣布 AI Pivot 的公司
summary: Angi CEO Jeff Kip joins Bloomberg’s Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec to discuss the company’s latest earnings, AI efforts, and Angi’s outlook on the housing market.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sutskever Says His OpenAI Stake Worth About $7 Billion
title_cn: Sutskever 表示他持有的 OpenAI 股份价值约 70 亿美元
summary: OpenAI co-founder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever said his stake in the ChatGPT maker is worth roughly $7 billion, making him one of the largest individual shareholders in the artificial intelligence startup.

title: A $400 AI Bet That’s a High-Stakes Wager on the Future of Work
title_cn: 400 美元的人工智能赌注是对未来工作的高风险赌注
summary: AI is set to have a profound impact on the workforce and productivity, but by how much and how quickly are still being debated and bet on by academics. Bloomberg’s Stacey Vanek Smith describes the $400 wager on the future of work. She joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rates Just One Factor for Stablecoin Growth, Says Circle CEO
title_cn: Circle 首席执行官表示，评级只是稳定币增长的因素之一
summary: Stablecoin issuer Circle says it’s moving closer to a future where AI agents can make financial transactions. The company saw a 20% revenue surge in its first-quarter, though net income declined amid volatility in cryptocurrency markets. Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire speaks with Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BMO's Schleif Says AI Stampede Fueling Rally Beyond Tech
title_cn: BMO 的施莱夫表示，人工智能的狂潮推动了科技之外的反弹
summary: Carol Schleif, chief market strategist for Bank of Montreal, says the buildout of AI infrastructure is lifting a broad cross section of stocks, not just a handful of tech names. She speaks with Ed Ludlow and Caroline Hyde on “Bloomberg Tech.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Market Optimistic on AI Surge, Ignoring Risks: Noviskis
title_cn: 市场对人工智能激增持乐观态度，忽视风险：Noviskis
summary: Jessica Noviskis, OCIO portfolio strategist at Marquette Associates, says market optimism is largely driven by strong earnings and the resurgence of the AI sector despite potential risks. "We are entirely pricing markets off of the good things that are happening," she said, "and ignoring the risks and the war and the potential for inflation and maybe rate hikes." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Michael Burry Warns of Stock Crash as Tech Jump Echoes 2000 Peak
title_cn: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 警告股市崩盘，科技跃升与 2000 年巅峰相呼应
summary: Michael Burry, the investor made famous in The Big Short, is warning that the Nasdaq 100 Index is headed toward a dramatic reversal after a “parabolic” surge that has driven technology valuations to unsustainable heights.

title: Why Stablecoins Are Crypto’s Real Payments Test
title_cn: 为什么稳定币是加密货币的真正支付测试
summary: Every year, Filipinos working overseas send $35 billion back home — and a growing share of those transfers are being executed using stablecoins. The blockchain technology promises to make cross-border payments cheaper and nearly instantaneous, offering an alternative to traditional remittance channels. But even though the opportunity could be huge, stablecoins remain a tiny part of the global payments system today. With the GENIUS Act set to take effect and banks eyeing the space, the race to scale is just getting started. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Investing in the Age of AI Disruption
title_cn: 投资人工智能颠覆时代
summary: Mike Pyle, Deputy Head of BlackRock's Portfolio Management Group joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI isn’t a bubble and how it’s  reshaping the global economy. He breaks down the short-term inflation hit vs. long-term productivity boom, and why traditional 60/40 portfolios are failing to diversify in an AI-dominated market. He also warns investors may be underestimating the economic risks from the Iran conflict, global oil disruptions, and the Strait of Hormuz crisis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bartels Expects Secular Bear Market to Start Next Decade
title_cn: 巴特尔斯预计长期熊市将在下一个十年开始
summary: Mary Ann Bartels, chief investment strategist at Sanctuary Wealth, shares her long term outlook for stocks. She believes a secular bear market will kickoff the next decade after a nice rally over the next four years. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Novo Hands Over Parkinson’s Therapy to Zuckerberg-Backed Startup
title_cn: Novo 将帕金森疗法移交给扎克伯格支持的初创公司
summary: Novo Nordisk A/S agreed to hand over an experimental therapy for Parkinson’s disease to a Mark Zuckerberg-backed AI startup to potentially speed its development.

title: Banks and Crypto Backers Tussle as Senators Eye Landmark Digital Asset Bill
title_cn: 参议员关注具有里程碑意义的数字资产法案，银行和加密货币支持者发生争执
summary: Banking groups are floating last-minute changes to a compromise on stablecoin yield as a key Senate panel begins considering a landmark digital asset bill.

title: Amazon Prepares to Sell First Swiss Franc Bond in AI Push
title_cn: 亚马逊准备发售首张瑞士法郎债券以推动人工智能发展
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. is preparing to issue Swiss franc bonds for the first time, as Big Tech hyperscalers turn to new debt markets to fund artificial intelligence spending.

title: AI Chipmaker Cerebras Seeks $4.8 Billion in Upsized US IPO
title_cn: AI芯片制造商Cerebras寻求在美国IPO规模扩大中筹集48亿美元
summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. increased the size of its initial public offering, now seeking to raise as much as $4.8 billion, as demand for the artificial intelligence chipmaker and data center operator’s shares continues to build.

title: Retail Is Flooding Into the Chipmaker Rally as Moves Get Extreme
title_cn: 随着行动变得极端，零售业正涌入芯片制造商的涨势
summary: Retail traders largely sat out a record-setting advance in chip stocks in April. Now they’re diving in just as worries mount that the group’s rally may be losing steam.

title: OpenAI to Buy Consulting Firm for JV With Private Equity
title_cn: OpenAI 将与私募股权公司收购咨询公司成立合资企业
summary: OpenAI will acquire a consulting company to contribute to a new private equity-backed joint venture to help drive adoption of its artificial intelligence software across more businesses.

title: Google Says Hacker Used Mythos-Like AI for Software Tool Exploit
title_cn: 谷歌称黑客利用类似神话的人工智能来攻击软件工具
summary: Security researchers at Alphabet Inc.’s Google said they believe a cybercrime group used artificial intelligence to create a hacking tool that can bypass defenses in a widely-used tool to administer computer systems.

title: India Considering Emergency Measures to Save Foreign Exchange
title_cn: 印度考虑采取紧急措施节省外汇
summary: India is considering emergency steps to shore up foreign-exchange reserves, including curbing non-essential imports like gold and electronic goods, and hiking fuel prices, to help cushion the economy from the fallout of the Iran war, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Shein, Temu Trade Blows as UK Trial Spotlights Supply Chains
title_cn: 英国试验聚焦供应链，Shein 和 Temu 贸易爆发
summary: Chinese e-commerce giant Shein and rival Temu have swapped legal blows at the start of a UK trial that’s expected to shine a light on the world of ultra-fast fashion.

title: Strait 'Only Lever' on Gas Prices: Kloza
title_cn: 海峡对天然气价格的“唯一杠杆”：Kloza
summary: Tom Kloza, Chief Energy Advisor at Gulf Oil, says reopening the Strait of Hormuz is "the only lever you can pull that has a major impact" on fuel prices, warning gasoline could reach $5 a gallon or higher this summer if it stays closed. He says pausing federal gasoline taxes would have limited impact and could be difficult to reinstate once halted. Kloza also cautions hurricane disruptions could push prices to "an apoplectic level." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Gas Tax Holiday Would Cost $3.5 Billion a Month
title_cn: 特朗普的汽油税假期每月将花费 35 亿美元
summary: A federal gasoline tax holiday as proposed by President Donald Trump would result in billions of dollars in lost tax revenue each month, independent budget analysts say.

title: US Colleges Report 20% Drop in Foreign Students Over Visa Clampdown
title_cn: 美国大学报告称，由于签证限制，外国学生数量下降了 20%
summary: The number of new foreign undergraduate students at US colleges dropped by an average of 20% this spring from a year earlier, according to a study by a coalition of education groups, the latest sign that President Donald Trump’s standoff with higher education is hammering a key source of talent and funding.

title: Taiwan 'Not a Bargaining Chip:' Rep. Tokuda
title_cn: 德田众议员：台湾“不是讨价还价的筹码”
summary: Representative Jill Tokuda (D-HI), a member of the House Armed Services Committee and House China Select Committee, warns Taiwan "must not be a bargaining chip" during President Donald Trump's talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping. She says Beijing “has been watching” US military deployments, arguing that the Iran conflict has put America in a “weakened position” ahead of talks. Rep. Tokuda also says the war "has never stopped" despite ceasefire claims and pushes for another congressional war powers vote when the House and Senate return next week. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Former FEMA Chief Hamilton to Lead Agency Again
title_cn: 特朗普任命前联邦应急管理局局长汉密尔顿再次领导该机构
summary: The Trump administration selected Cameron Hamilton to lead the Federal Emergency Management Agency, which is grappling with reduced staffing levels ahead of hurricane season in the Atlantic.

title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Is Weakened | Balance of Power: Early Edition 05/11/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火已被削弱权力平衡：早期版本 05/11/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the White House. On today's show, American Enterprise Institute Nonresident Senior Fellow Heather Conley, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Principal Cyber Advisor to the Secretary of the Army Brandon Pugh. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Takes Aim at Beef, Fuel Prices as Inflation Risks Mount
title_cn: 随着通胀风险加剧，特朗普瞄准牛肉和燃油价格
summary: US President Donald Trump has mounted a new push to tackle affordability, taking aim at beef and gasoline amid surging consumer prices that may threaten his party’s hold on Congress.

title: Zelenskiy’s Former Top Aide Is Accussed of Money-Laundering
title_cn: 泽伦斯基前高级助手被指控洗钱
summary: Ukraine’s anti-graft authorities have accused President Volodymyr Zelenskiy’s former top aide of money-laundering, according to a statement on Monday.

title: CATS: The Jellicle Ball Brings Ballroom Culture to Broadway
title_cn: CATS：杰利克舞会将舞厅文化带入百老汇
summary: Bill Rauch and Zhailon Levingston, co-directors of CATS: The Jellicle Ball, said that the story of CATS makes sense as iconic characters moving through the Harlem ballroom scene. Rauch and Levingston discuss how they brought the musical, which reimagines the classic Andrew Lloyd Weber musical, to life and how the story maps onto a new cultural context. Bloomberg Pursuits editor-at-large Chris Rovzar shared his experience with the show.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australia to Tackle Housing Tax as Budget Deficit Set to Narrow
title_cn: 澳大利亚将解决住房税问题，预算赤字将收窄
summary: Australia’s center-left government is expected to crack down on tax concession for property investors as part of efforts to ease generational inequality and help rein in a budget deficit.

title: Starmer Losing Fight to Stay in Power as Rebellion Spreads
title_cn: 随着叛乱蔓延，斯塔默失去了继续掌权的斗争
summary: Keir Starmer was facing a decision to step down as prime minister as dozens of members of Parliament, including his own home secretary, joined the calls for him to set out a time table for his departure.

title: Pentagon ‘Committed’ to Navy’s New Stealth F/A-XX Warplane
title_cn: 五角大楼“致力于”海军新型隐形 F/A-XX 战机
summary: The Pentagon’s leadership is now supportive of the Navy’s next-generation stealth fighter replacing the service’s aging F/A-18 Super Hornet, after previously pushing back against the new program.

title: Israel Will Prosecute Oct. 7 Suspects in Eichmann-Style Tribunal
title_cn: 以色列将在艾希曼式法庭起诉 10 月 7 日的嫌疑人
summary: Israel’s parliament approved a special military tribunal for hundreds of Palestinians accused of taking part in the attacks in southern Israel on Oct. 7, 2023, some of whom could face execution.

title: What Trump’s Gas Tax Plan Says About the War With Iran
title_cn: 特朗普的汽油税计划对与伊朗的战争有何影响
summary: The president floats suspending the federal levy as the conflict drags on.

title: Navy Plans to Buy 15 Costly Trump-Class Battleships by 2055
title_cn: 海军计划到 2055 年购买 15 艘昂贵的特朗普级战列舰
summary: The US Navy said it plans to buy at least 15 new battleships endorsed by President Donald Trump over the next 30 years, according to its new shipbuilding plan, marking a deeper commitment than previously revealed to what could be the costliest warship ever produced.

title: Musk, Cook Expected to Join Trump for Xi Summit in China
title_cn: 马斯克、库克预计将与特朗普一起出席中国习近平峰会
summary: The White House is inviting Tesla Inc.’s Elon Musk, Apple Inc.’s Tim Cook, Boeing Co.’s Kelly Ortberg and executives from other large companies to accompany President Donald Trump on his trip to China this week, according to an official.

title: South Africa’s Ramaphosa Says He Won’t Resign
title_cn: 南非总统拉马福萨表示不会辞职
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa said he will not resign during a televised address to the nation on Monday. “To do so would be to give credence to a panel report that unfortunately has grave flaws,” he said. An independent panel found Ramaphosa may be guilty of serious misconduct in relation to the theft of money at his game farm. (Corrects spelling of Ramaphosa)

title: Trump Says US-Iran Ceasefire on ‘Massive Life Support’
title_cn: 特朗普称美伊停火是为了“大规模生命支持”
summary: The ceasefire between the US and Iran reached a particularly precarious moment Monday as President Donald Trump said the agreement was on “massive life support” after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer.

title: Sean Duffy’s Reality Show Draws Ethics Concerns Over Sponsorships
title_cn: 肖恩·达菲的真人秀节目引发了对赞助的道德担忧
summary: Sean Duffy taped a reality TV show while leading the US Transportation Department, raising concerns about corporate sponsorships of the show from companies that are overseen by his department.

title: Protecting The US Against Cyber Threats Is a 'No Fail' Mission, Says Pugh
title_cn: 普格表示，保护美国免受网络威胁是一项“不会失败”的使命
summary: Brandon Pugh, Principal Cyber Advisor to the Secretary of the Army joins to discuss the current state of cyber security in the US. As well as the the importance of being on the cutting edge of cyber research.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: America's Capability and Creditably as An Ally Is Being Tested Says Conley
title_cn: 康利表示，美国作为盟友的能力和信誉正在经受考验
summary: Heather Conley, a senior fellow at the American Enterprise Institute, said President Trump goes into his summit in China this week in a weakened position because of the continuing standoff with Iran after he rejected Tehran’s latest peace offer. She also discussed the Ukraine ceasefire and what this means for the future for the region.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Secret Service, House Speaker to Talk Trump Ballroom Funding With Senate GOP
title_cn: 特勤局、众议院议长将与参议院共和党讨论特朗普宴会厅资金问题
summary: House Speaker Mike Johnson and the head of the Secret Service will meet with Senate Republicans Tuesday as lawmakers consider legislation giving that agency $1 billion to make security improvements tied to the White House ballroom.

title: Slovenia’s Nationalist Leader Backs Legislation Critics Say Favors Rich
title_cn: 斯洛文尼亚民族主义领导人支持立法批评者称有利于富人
summary: Slovenian lawmakers aligned with nationalist leader Janez Jansa pushed through a series of legislative amendments that critics say favor the Alpine country’s rich.

title: Trump to Sign Orders Monday Aimed at Lowering Beef Prices
title_cn: 特朗普周一签署命令旨在降低牛肉价格
summary: President Donald Trump will sign two executive orders Monday to try to lower beef prices, according to a White House official, the latest effort by the administration to counter high consumer prices ahead of November midterms.

title: Trump Says He Will Discuss Taiwan Arms Sales at Xi Summit
title_cn: 特朗普表示将在习近平峰会上讨论对台军售问题
summary: President Donald Trump said he will discuss US arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader Xi Jinping at a meeting this week, a move that risks undermining America’s longstanding support for the island.

title: Trump Says He'll Talk About Selling Arms to Taiwan at Xi Summit
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将在习近平峰会上讨论向台湾出售武器
summary: President Donald Trump said he will discuss US arms sales to Taiwan with Chinese leader Xi Jinping at a meeting this week. “I’m going to have that discussion,” Trump said. “President Xi would like us not to. And I’ll have that discussion.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Floats Temporary US Gas Tax Halt as Pump Prices Soar
title_cn: 随着汽油价格飙升，特朗普提议暂时停止美国汽油税
summary: President Donald Trump voiced support for a gasoline tax holiday to counter rising prices at the pump, as the cost of oil soars while the war with Iran drags on.
